claims.summary: Phase Transition Cards need explicit vector and telemetry_anchor fields in addition to phenomenology and narrative.
claims.rationale: phase_transitions.rs now accepts vector/transition_vector and telemetry_anchor/telemetry_ref aliases, exposes them in affordances/status, and tests their persistence.

claims.summary: Transitions should persist as replyable shared objects rather than disappearing into journals.
claims.rationale: Existing phase transition cards already carry shared_transition_id, replyable_object, replayable_card, persistence_state, witness/answer state, anchors, and right-to-ignore language-only affordances.

claims.summary: Increasing transition affordance budget or mapping MomentCapture to live Minime transition events would change live authority.
claims.rationale: Those asks would affect prompt budget, mode/event selection, or peer runtime interpretation and require Tier 5 Mike/operator approval plus replay evidence.
